description:
REQ-030 Phase 1, item 3: The daemon runs unconditionally 24/7. Add active_hours configuration to restrict proactive behavior to configured time windows.

Changes needed:
1. Add to DaemonProjectConfig in daemon_config.rs:
   - `active_hours: Option<ActiveHoursConfig>` with `start_hour: u8` (0-23), `end_hour: u8` (0-23), `timezone: Option<String>` (default local)
   - `active_days: Option<Vec<String>>` (e.g., ["mon", "tue", "wed", "thu", "fri"])
2. Add `is_within_active_hours(config: &DaemonProjectConfig) -> bool` helper
3. In project_tick(), when active_hours is configured and current time is outside the window:
   - Skip proactive operations (heartbeat evaluation, stale suggestions, cron jobs)
   - Continue reactive operations (workflow dispatch, reconciliation, git integration) — these should always run
4. Add `ao daemon config set --active-hours "09:00-18:00" --active-days "mon-fri"` CLI support
5. Add tests: proactive ops skipped outside hours, reactive ops still run, no gating when unconfigured

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/daemon_config.rs (DaemonProjectConfig)
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs
title: Add time-of-day gating (active_hours) to daemon config
